title: How to Repair a Corrupted SQL Dump
description: Corrupted dumps cause import errors and random failures. Here’s how to recover what you can.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Corrupted dumps often show invalid SQL or gzip errors. Recovery depends on where the damage is.

items: Split the dump to isolate the broken section

content.text: Related: **MySQL Error 2006: Server Has Gone Away**.

content.title: Recover what you can
content.text: Split the dump to isolate corruption.

faq.question: Can SQLSplit fix corrupted dumps?
faq.answer: It can help isolate the broken part so you can import the rest.
